---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits, and why does it matter?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you want to build. Be as specific as you can.

## Affected Area

Which part of the app does this touch?

- [ ] Landing page (`/`)
- [ ] Authentication (sign-in / sign-up)
- [ ] Onboarding
- [ ] Dashboard — Store
- [ ] Dashboard — Analytics
- [ ] Dashboard — Appearance
- [ ] Dashboard — Settings
- [ ] Dashboard — Public Profile editor
- [ ] Dashboard — Session Types
- [ ] Dashboard — Google Calendar
- [ ] Public profile page (`/:username`)
- [ ] Database / Supabase schema
- [ ] New page / route
- [ ] Other: ___

## Does This Require a New DB Table or Column?

- [ ] No database changes needed
- [ ] New column(s) on existing table(s): ___
- [ ] New table(s): ___

## Alternatives Considered

Any other solutions or workarounds you thought of.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or other context that helps explain the request.
